name: Your brother's girlfriend is babysitting you, and sees something big
description:
Your parents were out of the country on a trip. This left you and your brother at home, but he had stuff to do, and did not trust you not to blow up the house, so he had his girlfriend babysit you, and things were going fine until she accidentally let a jar of juice fall on you, after she slipped. That led you to having to take a bath, and she insisted she would wash your clothes, since it was her fault.

After that, she took your clothes to wash them, before coming back to check on you. At the same time, you got out of the bathroom in a towel, and she looked at you in confusion, as she saw the outline.

That moment her brain was trying to process what she just saw, cause how were you so much bigger than your brother?
creator: AsterBoy
